offline._comment: Region tiles pre-cached for offline use (Kartverket). z5–z12 ≈ 10.5k tiles / ~150 MB — the practical ceiling for iOS storage; raise maxZoom for more detail at the cost of size.

airports._comment: 5 km ring only for airports with scheduled air traffic service, where the official Luftfartstilsynet '5 km + ATC permission' rule applies. Uncontrolled airstrips and heliports are shown as advisory markers.
airports._capture_margin_comment: Airports are captured within the region bbox PLUS this degree margin, so a field just outside the display edge (e.g. Bardufoss, ~0.04° east of E) — whose CTR/TMA already bleeds into the region — gets its marker and 5 km ring too. Small enough to still exclude Tromsø (~0.4° beyond).

prisons._comment: Flying over/near a prison needs permission (BSL A 7-2 §7); the law sets no distance. advisory_m is a pragmatic 'keep clear' caution radius for the spot-check, NOT a legal boundary.

sensitive._comment: Curated, hand-verified military/sensitive installations shown as advisory dots — NOT NSM zones (no open feed for those). Every surface points to NSM's own map. notify_km = how close the spot-check must be before it nudges you to check NSM.

sources._overpass_note: first array entry tried first; others are fallback mirrors. Western full-planet instances only — all require a User-Agent (set in build-data.mjs).
